name: pr-review-generator
description: CLI tool to generate review prompt markdown and PR diff from Jira and Bitbucket

scripts.package: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js --no-bytecode --public --targets node20-linux-x64,node20-macos-x64,node20-macos-arm64,node20-win-x64 --output bin/pr-review-generator
scripts.package:win: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.js --no-bytecode --public --targets node20-win-x64 --output bin/pr-review-generator

author: sidec15
